SOURCE: 26048718.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (26048718.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced Human Resources professional with a strong background in strategic talent acquisition, employee development, and operational management. Holds a Doctorate of Business Administration (Leadership) from Walden University and a Master's degree in Finance from the University of St. Thomas.
SKILLS: Strategic Talent Acquisition, Employee Development, Operational Management, Leadership, Finance, Human Resources Operations, Budgeting and Financial Reporting, Training and Development, Employee Relations, Labor Laws, Compliance, Performance Improvement, Market Trends Analysis, Conflict Resolution

SOURCE: 26048718.pdf
JOB TITLE: Human Resources Consultant
COMPANY: 
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Assisted with the coordination of the Employee Satisfaction Survey (YOU COUNT) and generated statistical reports for Executive Leadership. Collaborated with physicians to develop and coordinate the Physician Satisfaction Survey.

SOURCE: 26048718.pdf
JOB TITLE: Business Unit Vice President / Human Resources Branch Manager
COMPANY: 
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Liaised with the Executive Vice President of Global Oil & Gas and Power, a team of Relationship Managers, representatives, and customers through strong communication. Created reports and presented to Executive Management.

COMPANY: 
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Responsible for human resource management of staff including recruitment, selection, wage determination, promotions, employee relations, explanation of benefits, disciplinary actions, credentialing, and performance appraisals.

DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Taught Research Techniques to Grade School and Middle School students. Prepared budgets for circulation and guided superintendent and principal in the selection and acquisition of materials and equipment.

DESCRIPTION: Forecasted customers' needs by utilizing Need Assessments of assigned departments to plan, design, develop, implement, and evaluate educational programs. Developed Leadership and Management/Supervisor level courses.
